Treatment: Chemotherapy (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received chemotherapy days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
952 CHMTHRPY_14_CD CHMTHRPY_14_CD O0110A1B Treatment: Chemotherapy (14 days) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received chemotherapy while a resident of the facility and within the last 14 days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
